text.message: wont be fun as last to pick
Looks very clearly like a plow
You realize I already have a very tough game
I was not plowing your settle
Both of the plows throw me out of the game
2 ore and a brick to 4:1 my cards
Orange has dropped more roads than I have
You’re literally on 4 with a dev and 15 cards
And I had to give you 3 cards to port mine
i was offering a good deal
Don’t expect to get trades when you’re stingy yourself man
